title: The Chill Out
description: Official Mod Pack for The Chill Out - Community SMP/RP Server!
body:
This mod pack is created to preserve as much as possible of the original Minecraft gameplay while adding optimisations, quality of life improvements, and a touch of "The Chill Out" Vibes.

We've been testing to ensure that every player enjoyed the same experience while playing on multiple community servers, and after a trial period, they were all very excited. It's an improved, newer experience compared with the vanilla version, and you don't want to miss out on it!

This mod pack, which we have curated, brings together the best gameplay experience for any server you want to play on. If you're eager to dive in and start playing quickly, this mod pack will get you into the action in no time.

**How to install?**
-------------------------------------------------------------
- We recommend the Modrinth Launcher. Easy to use for everybody!
- Sign in to the launcher with your Minecraft account
- Download the latest version of Familien - SMP Pack
- Delete old versions first, if necessary! 
- Install the SMP pack via the Modrinth Launcher

**Questions about this TCO Mod Pack**
-------------------------------------------------------------
- In case of questions, please join the Discord of The Chill Out
- Place your questions in the text channel Games. Don't forget to select your preferred Language!
- Our community is ready to help you around
